diagrams.title: Expense Tracker Phases and Dependencies
diagrams.description: Modeling the phases and their dependencies in the Expense Tracker project
diagrams.mermaid_code: flowchart LR; PHASE-01["PHASE-01: Setup (Shared Infrastructure)"] --> PHASE-02["PHASE-02: Foundational (Blocking Prerequisites)"] --> PHASE-03["PHASE-03: User Story 1 - Add an Expense (Priority: P1)"] --> PHASE-04["PHASE-04: User Story 2 - View Expenses (Priority: P1)"] --> PHASE-05["PHASE-05: User Story 3 - Delete an Expense (Priority: P1)"] --> PHASE-06["PHASE-06: User Story 4 - View Dashboard Totals (Priority: P2)"] --> PHASE-07["PHASE-07: Polish & Cross-Cutting Concerns"]

diagrams.title: Task Dependencies in Expense Tracker
diagrams.description: Illustrating the dependencies between tasks in the Expense Tracker project
diagrams.mermaid_code: flowchart LR; T001["T001: Create src/server/types.ts"] --> T002["T002: Create src/server/validators.ts"] --> T003["T003: Create UI components folder and stubs"] --> T004["T004: Create src/server/storage.ts"] --> T005["T005: Update app/page.tsx"]

diagrams.title: User Story 1 - Add an Expense
diagrams.description: Sequence diagram for User Story 1 - Add an Expense
diagrams.mermaid_code: sequenceDiagram; participant User as "User"; participant ExpenseForm as "ExpenseForm"; participant Storage as "Storage"; User->>ExpenseForm: Fill form; ExpenseForm->>Storage: Add expense; Storage->>ExpenseForm: Confirm addition; ExpenseForm->>User: Display confirmation

diagrams.title: Expense Tracker Entity Relationship Diagram
diagrams.description: Entity relationship diagram for the Expense Tracker
diagrams.mermaid_code: erDiagram; EXPENSE ||--o{ CATEGORY : "has"; EXPENSE { int id PK, string description, float amount, date date }; CATEGORY { int id PK, string name };
